news.title: Dixon Technologies sees a block trade worth ₹120.6 crores, involving 119,088 shares at ₹10,126 each.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies sees a block trade worth ₹120.6 crores, involving 119,088 shares at ₹10,126 each.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies acquired 74% in Dixtel Infocom Pvt Ltd via JV with Longcheer, investing INR 7.39 Cr.
Dixtel Infocom will focus on manufacturing smart devices and electronics, boosting ODM expertise in India.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies acquired 74% in Dixtel Infocom Pvt Ltd via JV with Longcheer, investing INR 7.39 Cr.
Dixtel Infocom will focus on manufacturing smart devices and electronics, boosting ODM expertise in India.

news.title:
Dixon Tech conducted NSE block trade of ~50,499 shares at Rs. 10,505.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 53.05 crores.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech conducted NSE block trade of ~50,499 shares at Rs. 10,505.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 53.05 crores.

news.title: Dixon Technologies shares gain over 4%, trading higher.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies shares gain over 4%, trading higher.

news.title:
Promoters offloaded 5.3% stake in Aditya Infotech for ₹920.8 crore.
Shares rallied 7.3% to ₹1,574.6 post-deal; buyers included Axis and Motilal Oswal Mutual Funds.
news.summary:
Promoters offloaded 5.3% stake in Aditya Infotech for ₹920.8 crore.
Shares rallied 7.3% to ₹1,574.6 post-deal; buyers included Axis and Motilal Oswal Mutual Funds.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies plans telecom device manufacturing unit in MP's TMZ.
The firm is evaluating Gwalior for its expansion strategy in telecom devices.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies plans telecom device manufacturing unit in MP's TMZ.
The firm is evaluating Gwalior for its expansion strategy in telecom devices.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies announces investor meetings with Millennium, Wellington, and Oxbow.
Meetings will be virtual/in-person on Feb 26-27, 2026, with no sensitive info shared.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies announces investor meetings with Millennium, Wellington, and Oxbow.
Meetings will be virtual/in-person on Feb 26-27, 2026, with no sensitive info shared.

news.title:
Dixon Tech shares fell 3.3% amid concerns over rising DRAM prices, impacting the smartphone sector.
Morgan Stanley rated it 'Underweight' with a target of ₹8,157, citing risks to demand in India's budget segment.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech shares fell 3.3% amid concerns over rising DRAM prices, impacting the smartphone sector.
Morgan Stanley rated it 'Underweight' with a target of ₹8,157, citing risks to demand in India's budget segment.

news.title: Dixon Technologies faces pressure after downgrade over rising memory costs.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies faces pressure after downgrade over rising memory costs.

news.title:
CLSA downgrades Dixon Technologies to hold, lowers target to ₹12,100.
Strong demand for AI-driven HBM and DDR5 noted, but risks in low-end volumes.
news.summary:
CLSA downgrades Dixon Technologies to hold, lowers target to ₹12,100.
Strong demand for AI-driven HBM and DDR5 noted, but risks in low-end volumes.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies forms JV with Longcheer and Dixtel Infocom to manufacture electronics.
Dixon holds 74%, Longcheer 26%; JV turnover is nil as of Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies forms JV with Longcheer and Dixtel Infocom to manufacture electronics.
Dixon holds 74%, Longcheer 26%; JV turnover is nil as of Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies held a one-on-one meeting with Birla MF on 12th Feb 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared or presentations made during the meeting.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies held a one-on-one meeting with Birla MF on 12th Feb 2026.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies appoints Josh Foulger as President of IT Hardware & New Projects in Padget Electronics, effective 16th Feb 2026.
Foulger, a seasoned veteran with 30+ years in ESDM, aims to drive Dixon's IT hardware vision and industry leadership.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies appoints Josh Foulger as President of IT Hardware & New Projects in Padget Electronics, effective 16th Feb 2026.
Foulger, a seasoned veteran with 30+ years in ESDM, aims to drive Dixon's IT hardware vision and industry leadership.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies informed about an institutional investor meeting held virtually on Feb 5, 2026.
The meeting was one-on-one with Equirus Securities; no price-sensitive info or presentations were shared.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies informed about an institutional investor meeting held virtually on Feb 5, 2026.

news.title:
Dixon and Kaynes Tech shares drop over 4% due to Qualcomm's disappointing results.
Qualcomm cited memory chip shortages and rising costs; Dixon down 2.8% and Kaynes 4% ahead of results.
news.summary:
Dixon and Kaynes Tech shares drop over 4% due to Qualcomm's disappointing results.
Qualcomm cited memory chip shortages and rising costs; Dixon down 2.8% and Kaynes 4% ahead of results.

news.title:
Dixon reports delay in Vivo joint venture, impacting growth.
Company anticipates smartphone market slowdown, affecting prospects.
news.summary:
Dixon reports delay in Vivo joint venture, impacting growth.

news.title:
15.1 lakh Dixon Tech shares traded on Wednesday, reflecting activity.
Infosys and TCS lost ₹1.3 lakh crore in market capitalization.

news.title:
Syrma SGS & Dixon Tech reassess semiconductor plans post ISM 2.0 announcement.
ISM 2.0 aims to build upstream capabilities; EMS firms eye margin expansion.
news.summary:

news.title:
Dixon Technologies reports Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 10,678 cr, EBITDA INR 421 cr.
Mobile EMS revenue at INR 9,750 cr; 6.9M smartphone volumes; Vivo JV approval near.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies reports Q3 FY26 revenue of INR 10,678 cr, EBITDA INR 421 cr.
Mobile EMS revenue at INR 9,750 cr; 6.9M smartphone volumes; Vivo JV approval near.

news.title:
India-US trade deal boosts policy certainty for electronics makers like Tata Electronics, Foxconn, Dixon, and Syrma SGS.
Apple plans to double iPhone production in India, targeting 50M+ units in 3 years, reinforcing India's export growth.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal boosts policy certainty for electronics makers like Tata Electronics, Foxconn, Dixon, and Syrma SGS.
